# SERAVOLVE

> Clinical-grade skincare brand from India. Products include Vitamin C serums, SPF 50 sunscreen, hyaluronic acid moisturisers, niacinamide toners, and salicylic acid face wash. Manufactured by ELISENSE ENTERPRISE LLP, Surat, Gujarat, India.

SERAVOLVE formulates advanced skincare sequences engineered specifically for India's harsh climate — extreme UV, high humidity, urban pollution, and heat-triggered inflammation. Every product is non-comedogenic, cruelty-free, and backed by clinical ingredient concentrations.

## Products

- [Luminosity 10% Vitamin C Serum](/products/luminosity-10-vitamin-c-serum) — ₹599 — Ultra-stable 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid for deep brightening. Reduces dark spots in 21 days. Suitable for all skin types.
- [Ultra-Light SPF 50 PA++++ Sunscreen](/products/ultra-light-spf-50-pa-sunscreen-for-broad-spectrum-protection-description) — Broad spectrum hybrid UV filters. Zero white-cast, zero oiliness. Re-apply every 3–4 hours in direct sun.
- [Oil-Free Hydrating Face Moisturiser](/products/oil-free-hydrating-face-moisturizer-for-all-skin-types) — Triple Ceramide Complex (2.5%) + Squalane (2%). 240% increase in hydration for 48 hours. Non-greasy for Indian summers.
- [Rice Water 3% Niacinamide Brightening Toner](/products/rice-water-3-niacinamide-brightening-toner-for-pore-refining) — Fermented rice water + Niacinamide. 88% reduction in visible pores. 100% alcohol-free.
- [2% Salicylic Acid Deep Cleansing Face Wash](/products/2-salicylic-acid-deep-cleansing-face-wash-for-acne-control) — Encapsulated BHA for deep-pore purification. 91% reduction in active acne. Safe for daily use.

## Features

- All products formulated for Indian climate conditions (humidity, UV, pollution)
- Cruelty-free and PETA certified
- Free shipping on orders ₹999+
- Personalized AM/PM skincare routine via the [Routine Builder](/routine-builder) quiz
- Shop by skin concern (acne, dryness, pigmentation, UV protection, pores) at [/concern](/concern)
- Minimum 6-month shelf life after opening; 24-month if unopened

## Key Ingredients and Concentrations

- 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid (10%) — ultra-stable Vitamin C
- Ferulic Acid (0.5%) — potentiates Vitamin C and SPF
- Triple Ceramide Complex (2.5%) — barrier repair
- Squalane (2%) — lightweight emollient
- Niacinamide (3%) — pore refinement and sebum regulation
- Salicylic Acid / BHA (2%) — oil-soluble exfoliant for acne
- Fermented Rice Water — amino acids for skin softening
- Liquorice Root Extract (1%) — hyperpigmentation reduction
- Allantoin (0.5%) — soothing anti-irritant
- Zinc PCA (1%) — sebum regulation

## Brand Identity

SERAVOLVE is positioned as a clinical-grade, science-backed skincare brand. Brand language: glacial-pure, bio-catalyst, molecular sequences, clinical efficacy. Target audience: Indian consumers aged 16–45 seeking dermatologist-grade formulations without the clinical price tag.
